arts.ttl: Aston Villa kick off time change explained vs Liverpool after Premier League decision made
arts.sum: City will play Brighton on Saturday evening before Liverpool's clash with Villa, while Arsenal will face Chelsea at Stamford Bridge in matchday 11's standout fixture. Arne Slot's Liverpool side are set to welcome Unai Emery's Aston Villa after victories over Brighton and Bayer Leverkusen this week.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot reveals 'important' moment in FSG talks that led to key decision
arts.sum: The Liverpool head coach has enjoyed a terrific start to his tenure, having been impressed himself by conversations with FSG during appointment talks this summer.

arts.ttl: 'I left Liverpool because I didn't want to become a loser – I found a way to be happy'
arts.sum: Christian Benteke joined Liverpool from Aston Villa in 2015 but the striker failed to live up to his reputation before choosing to leave Jurgen Klopp's team for Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: Arsenal step up interest in £83m-rated attacker on Liverpool, Man United, Chelsea radar
arts.sum: Arsenal are interested in signing the Sporting CP winger Geovany Quenda. According to Fichajes, they have now stepped up their interest in signing the 17-year-old winger and they will face competition from Liverpool, Manchester United and Chelsea. All four clubs are keeping close tabs on his development, and they could look to make a move […] The post Arsenal step up interest in £83m-rated attacker on Liverpool, Man United, Chelsea radar appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: I felt scapegoated at Liverpool - but my next boss loved me at Aston Villa
arts.sum: Stephen Warnock spent five years with Liverpool but has claimed his time at Anfield was later eclipsed by stints with Blackburn Rovers and Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Aston Villa 8pm kick-off time explained as Premier League change made

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Aston Villa score predicted as Premier League charge continues
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Aston Villa at Anfield on Saturday evening, so we simulated the game to predict the outcome.

arts.ttl: 'I was scapegoated and mistreated at Liverpool - it was very different at Aston Villa'
arts.sum: Stephen Warnock spent five years at his boyhood club Liverpool but has claimed his time there was later eclipsed by his stints with Blackburn Rovers and Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool host Aston Villa in the Premier League this weekend looking to preserve their status as Premier League leaders. Arne Slot has overseen a superb start to his reign as Liverpool manager and a midweek thrashing of German champions Bayer Leverkusen was arguably his best result to date.
